lines.content: Okay, so I will let you know from that email. I will reply once I have the information as per the distance to access the apartment and to access the other apartment.
lines.name: Chanie Ben-Bassat

lines.content: Mm-hmm yes, ma'am. Alright, so we'll just wait for that and yeah, just wait for the email that I'll be sending.
lines.name: Jeline Lavarias

lines.content: Okay it might take a couple of weeks. I'm not sure it's not up to me. I have to wait for a reply.
lines.name: Chanie Ben-Bassat

lines.content: Okay, ma'am. No worries. Anyway, your move is in September so we still have got a lot of, alright, well, it's so nice to talk to you today. Enjoy the rest of your day. Bye for now.
lines.name: Jeline Lavarias

lines.content: Okay, alrighty, thank you so very much I appreciate it.
lines.name: Chanie Ben-Bassat
